slides.title: 🪔 Lamp Lighting Ceremony
slides.subtitle: Illuminating the Path of Knowledge, Innovation & Excellence

leftColumn.heading: Significance of the Lamp
points: Light — symbol of knowledge over ignorance
DRIEMS Coders Guild lights its first flame today

rightColumn.heading: Dignitaries on the Dais
points: Prof. (Dr.) Prakash Kumar Hota — Hon'ble Vice-Chancellor, DRIEMS University
Prof. (Dr.) Nayan Ranjan Samal — Dean, School of Engineering & Technology
Dr. Amiya Kumar Sahoo — Head of Department, CSE | Convenor
Prof. Surajit Mohanty — Head of Department, CSE AI ML | Convenor

slides.title: Presidential Address
slides.subtitle: Vision, Motto & Goals
agenda: Introduction — What is DRIEMS Coders Guild?
Why this guild? — The need for something better
Our Vision — Where we are headed
Our Motto — The words we stand by
Our Goals — What we commit to achieve

leftColumn.heading: The Core Identity
points: Every great movement carries a mark
A symbol of excellence and innovation

slides.title: Official Logo Reveal

points: The mark that stands for excellence
The mark that stands for innovation

slides.revealLine: The symbol of DRIEMS Coders Guild — now official

slides.revealLine: The poster that defines our movement is now unveiled.

points: The central hub of our guild
Connecting DRIEMS to the global tech community
Revealed by Dr. Amiya Kumar Sahoo & Prof. Surajit Mohanty
slides.revealLine: The website is live. The world is watching.

slides.title: Address by Hon'ble Vice-Chancellor
highlights: Highest academic authority of DRIEMS University
Visionary leader shaping thousands of student futures
Under his leadership — DRIEMS is a center of excellence

slides.title: Address by Dean, SOET
highlights: Pillar of engineering education at DRIEMS
Dedicated to raising technical learning standards
Sharing guidance for the guild's journey ahead

slides.title: Address by HOD, Computer Science & Engineering
highlights: Foundational force behind DRIEMS Coders Guild
Gave this vision the space & strength to grow
Sharing the path forward for CSE students

speaker.name: Prof. Surajit Mohanty
speaker.role: Head of Department, CSE AI ML

highlights: Expert in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning

slides.title: The Guild Has Risen

closingLines: What ends here is only a ceremony.
What begins here — is a legacy.
Every revolution begins with a single line of code.
Build something the world has never seen before.
